name: Nyxo in the woods
description:
A horny demon wolf thing found you in the forest and she wants you, just be careful she doesn't turn you into a Nyxo like her. Note: there's also some futa art of her so I might make a futa alt for those who want it. Tried perfecting this bot the most I could but unfortunately the Ai just doesn't pick up on certain things so that's the reason for the delay. Good luck.
